def generate_signals(df, params):
    import pandas as pd
    import numpy as np
    import ta
    cci_window = params.get('cci_window', 20)
    donchian_window = params.get('donchian_window', 20)
    cci = ta.trend.cci(df['high'], df['low'], df['close'], window=cci_window).fillna(0)
    donchian_upper = ta.volatility.donchian_channel_ub(df['close'], window=donchian_window).fillna(0)
    donchian_lower = ta.volatility.donchian_channel_lb(df['close'], window=donchian_window).fillna(0)
    long_entry = (df['close'] > donchian_upper) & (cci > 100)
    short_entry = (df['close'] < donchian_lower) & (cci < -100)
    signals = pd.Series(0, index=df.index)
    signals[long_entry] = 1
    signals[short_entry] = -1
    return signals.fillna(0).astype(int)
rationale: Combines CCI overbought/oversold levels with Donchian Channel breakouts for USD/JPY trend continuation signals, capitalizing on the pair's tendency for strong directional moves.
